title: chromolaena odorata
intro: Chromolaena odorata, also known as Eupatorium odoratum or Lantana camara, is a flowering plant native to the Americas and now widely distributed in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Chromolaena odorata include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Chromolaena odorata is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or used topically to treat various health conditions.
